parameters.query: SELECT d.zoho_id, d.deal_name, d.stage, d.amount, d.probability, d.closing_date, d.pipeline, d.owner_name, a.account_name, a.industry FROM zoho_deals d LEFT JOIN zoho_accounts a ON d.account_zoho_id = a.zoho_id WHERE d.stage NOT IN ('Closed Won', 'Closed Lost') AND (d.zoho_id NOT IN (SELECT deal_zoho_id FROM deal_score WHERE scored_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days')) ORDER BY d.amount DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 20;

parameters.body: ={"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","max_tokens":2000,"system":"You are a B2B deal scoring agent for TAS (Traffic & Access Solutions). Score each deal 0-100 based on engagement level, budget confirmation, decision timeline, competitive position, and strategic fit. Return JSON array: [{\"zoho_id\": \"...\", \"score\": N, \"factors\": {...}, \"risk_flags\": [...], \"recommendation\": \"...\"}]","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Score these deals: " + JSON.stringify($json)}]}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO deal_score (deal_zoho_id, score, factors, risk_flags, recommendation) VALUES ('{{$json.zoho_id}}', {{$json.score}}, '{{JSON.stringify($json.factors)}}'::jsonb, ARRAY[{{$json.risk_flags.map(f => "'" + f + "'").join(',')}}]::text[], '{{$json.recommendation}}') ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

meta.description: Monday 7 AM — AI-scores open deals based on engagement, budget, timeline, and competitive position. Stores in deal_score.
